articles.title: Witcher 3 Expansion Delayed to 2027
articles.description: CD Projekt Red confirms Witcher 3 expansion Songs of the Past was initially set for 2026 but is now postponed to 2027 for quality reasons.
articles.impact: Fans must wait longer for the expansion.

articles.title: Subnautica 2 Set for $250 Million Bonus
articles.description: Subnautica 2 has achieved record sales, triggering a potential $250 million bonus for its developers at Unknown Worlds, now part of Krafton.
articles.impact: Record sales lead to significant developer bonuses.

articles.title: Persona 6 Character Designs Leak Online
articles.description: Leaked designs for Persona 6 reveal character details, but the revival of Persona 4 may delay further announcements.
articles.impact: Fans await more news amid leaks.

articles.title: Websites Can Now Spy via SSD Activity
articles.description: New methods allow websites to track users by analyzing SSD activity through JavaScript, raising privacy concerns.
articles.impact: New tracking methods threaten user privacy.

articles.title: Marathon Season 2 Introduces Survival Horror
articles.description: Marathon's Season 2 launches June 2, featuring a new survival horror theme and a free trial from June 2-9.
articles.impact: Players can explore new horror elements for free.
